channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish bags split open., 5th March
item.description:
Bins were collected 2 days ago and sack are still here. Does this mean they will be here for another 2 weeks? Bags are all split now and rubbish is spilled into immediate pavement area and road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rushmore Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small green bin full and overflowing, 5th March
item.description:
Pls empty
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Way, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 5th March
item.description:
Flytipping bed mattresses sofa garden waste etc usual suspects white van man dumping late at night it’s become a Flytipping hotspot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip of furniture outside Howard House, 5th March
item.description:
Flytip of furniture outside Howard House
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Howard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obstruction on the pavement on Reighton Road, 5th March
item.description:
From approximately number 94 onwards, there are many bins lined up outside the properties on the walkway. This is making it difficult for pedestrians to pass comfortably, especially people with buggies and wheelchair users.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Churchyard fence post loose and falling onto pavement, 5th March
item.description:
St George's Churchyard is maintained by Bromley Council and as such the security of the fence falls within your remit. This fencepost is very loose and could fall onto those using the public footway on St George's Road. Your help is appreciated..

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in bin area, 5th March
item.description:
Fly tipping in bin area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 inch, 5th March
item.description:
This potholes has been here more than 3 years and can you fix this problem on the road as soon as possible Before traffic lights turn left on this road

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat on pavement, 5th March
item.description:
Dead rat on pavement, about 50 yards uphill from bus stop SB.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elizabeth Fry Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not being emptied or being emptied properly, 5th March
item.description:
We a Peabody have received a complaint about wheelie bins. Bins are not being emptied fully/properly and not frequently enough. Excess rubbish is regularly being placed on pathway and causing obstruction and health hazard. the council needs to be informed to take the rubbish each week. If this is not a Peabody problem, please can you refer it to Bexley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leatherbottle Green, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loman street parking sign is vandelised, 5th March
item.description:
A permit holders tp is damaged on loman street lp 01

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Loman Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover clanking, 5th March
item.description:
This manhole has been reported numerous times in the last month. Also in April 2025 when it was fixed. The clanking is still happening. It has just been tarmaced over without the clanking being fixed. Please can this be resolved. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tooley Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People throwing rubbish in a/way next to 123 Hurst Rd Erith, 5th March
item.description:
People throwing rubbish in a/way next to 123 Hurst Rd Erith
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Hurst Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 5th March
item.description:
Directly outside 96 Reighton there is a whole lot of litter just left there, can this be collected pls

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Reighton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley full of black bags outside Christcurch in Victoria Road Erith., 5th March
item.description:
Repeatedly, someone is leaving a shopping trolley full of black bags next to the yellow bin outside Christchurch in Victoria Road Erith. Can it be removed please. This is an ongoing issue. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass outside a flat close to the bus stop., 5th March
item.description:
Broken glass at this location..
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 265A, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pieces of dead wood dropped from this plane tree onto the footway on St Georges Road, 5th March
item.description:
Three large pieces of bark which appear to be from this tree were found on the public footway on St George's Road this morning. This could cause damage to persons and vehicles. It is close to a primary school and a busy footway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not being emptied and overflowing on to pavement., 5th March
item.description:
Bins are not being emptied fully/properly and not frequently enough. Excess rubbish is regularly being placed on pathway and causing obstruction and health hazard. Either the mobile caretakers for this block needs to start taking excess rubbish or the council need to be informed to take the rubbish each week. If this is not a Peabody problem, please can you refer it to Bexley.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leatherbottle Green, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins not emptied, 5th March
item.description:
Bins full from the weekend. Photo taken Wednesday litter falling out into the surrounding area along the parade and down Anerley hill. This seems to be a continued issue with these bin size not suitable for the high volume/traffic of people at this time of year which will get worse in the months to come if some sort of action isn’t taken.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Parade, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Wood Pigeon in the tree pit o/s 151 Melbourne Gr, 5th March
item.description:
A dead Wood Pigeon appeared this morning in the tree pit on the public pavement outside 151 Melbourne Grove SE22 8SA.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 157, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
